title: Prelude: MIDI Mentor
description: Interactive music-learning app using MIDI input, rendered notation, and immediate feedback to practice notes, chords, and inversions.
techStack: React | TypeScript | Vite | VexFlow | Web MIDI | PWA

title: OpenReader AI
description: Local AI text-to-speech reader with asynchronous generation, sentence highlighting, playback controls, saved clips, and offline synthesis.
techStack: React | TypeScript | Python | FastAPI | XTTS | Local AI

title: Game Catalog
description: Responsive video game discovery app featuring search, dynamic filtering, trailer previews, and skeleton loading.
techStack: Next.js | TypeScript | Tailwind CSS | REST API

title: LTO Moonbase
description: Full-stack marketing and onboarding website for a blockchain leasing startup, deployed through Nginx with SSL.
